title: Process for Creating Effective Bar Plots in R
description: A flowchart outlining the step-by-step process and key decisions involved in creating, customizing, and refining bar plots using ggplot2 in R.
relationships: Flow from one element to the next, with the output of 'Data Preparation' feeding into 'Choose ggplot2 & geom_bar()', which then requires decisions for 'Map Variables', leading to aesthetic enhancements via 'Add Labels & Title' and 'Apply Themes', culminating in a final 'Review & Refine' step.
